title: pentacalia micropachyphylla
intro: Pentacalia micropachyphylla, also known as the lesser pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pentacalia micropachyphylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pentacalia micropachyphylla are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures and capsules.
